theory.canonical_statement: ID3644 records Quantum Stress-Energy Tensor as a source-extracted canonical equation.
theory.technical_interpretation: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `D:\00_Engine\CSV\emergent_curvature_theory.tex` for registry alignment and later derivation.

egin{equation} \hat{\mathcal{G}}_{\mu
u}[t] = \Module\left[ egin{aligned} &\{\mathcal{K}, T_{\mu
u}, ho_{	ext{quantum}}, S_{	ext{vN}}\}, \ &\mathcal{K}[t,t'] = \exp[-(t-t')/	au_{	ext{dec}}] 	imes \Theta(t-t'); \ &\hat{\mathcal{G}}_{\mu
u} = \int_{-\infty}^t \mathcal{K}[t,	au] 	imes \left[T_{\mu
u}(	au) +  rac{\hbar c^3}{8\pi G}\Delta S_{\mu
u}(	au)ight] d	au; \ &\Delta S_{\mu
u} = \partial_{\mu}\partial_{
u}S_{	ext{vN}}[ho] - g_{\mu
u}\Box S_{	ext{vN}}[ho] \end{aligned}ight] \end{equation}

blocks.wolfram_input: HoldForm[TZPIDCanonicalLatex["ID3644", 1, "\\begin{equation} \\hat{\\mathcal{G}}_{\\mu\\nu}[t] = \\Module\\left[\\begin{aligned} &\\{\\mathcal{K}, T_{\\mu\\nu}, \\rho_{\\text{quantum}}, S_{\\text{vN}}\\}, \\\\ &\\mathcal{K}[t,t'] = \\exp[-(t-t')/\\tau_{\\text{dec}}] \\times \\Theta(t-t'); \\\\ &\\hat{\\mathcal{G}}_{\\mu\\nu} = \\int_{-\\infty}^t \\mathcal{K}[t,\\tau] \\times \\left[T_{\\mu\\nu}(\\tau) + \\frac{\\hbar c^3}{8\\pi G}\\Delta S_{\\mu\\nu}(\\tau)\\right] d\\tau; \\\\ &\\Delta S_{\\mu\\nu} = \\partial_{\\mu}\\partial_{\\nu}S_{\\text{vN}}[\\rho] - g_{\\mu\\nu}\\Box S_{\\text{vN}}[\\rho] \\end{aligned}\\right] \\end{equation}"]]
normalization_notes: Carrier form preserves exact LaTeX as Wolfram string data
Semantic/numeric interpretation remains a later domain-specific upgrade

carrier_semantics.claim: The block is a valid Wolfram carrier for the source equation text; it is not yet a domain-specific computational proof.
